content:
# Recommendations — next plan iter (post iter-007)

## P1 — Blueprint hygiene (STRUCTURAL, recurring 4th iter)
1. **Fix 10 undefined macros in `Functors.tex`** (crashes `leanblueprint web`):
   `\Fin`, `\GrassChart`, `\GrassVars`, `\grassChartRing`, `\grassFrame`, `\grassFrameLoc`,
   `\grassMinor`, `\grassOverlapRing`, `\grassTrans`, `\grassTransMatrix`. Define in `common.tex`
   (or chapter `\providecommand`). This is the 4th consecutive iter of undefined-macro breakage
   (`\grass`→`\NN`/`\relproj`/`\range`→these). **Add the macro-define step to the helper-blueprinting
   checklist** so it stops recurring: before adding `\lean{foo}` blocks that reference notation, define
   the notation macros in the same edit.
2. **Clear coverage debt: blueprint the 20 `unmatched` helpers.** Prover task_results already give
   suggested labels + `\uses` edges — author the prose from those. List:
   - **Basic.lean (12)** under a new `chapters/Basic.tex` "relativeProj single-chart model" §, all
     `\uses{def:relative-proj}`: `projChartGrading`, `projChart`, `projChartToSpecZero`,
     `projChart_finiteType`, `projChartToSpecZero_isSeparated`, `projChartToSpecZero_isProper`,
     `algebraMap_projChartGradeZero_bijective`, `projChartGradeZeroEquiv`, `specGradeZeroIsoSpecBase`,
     `projChartToSpecBase`, `projChartToSpecBase_isSeparated`, `projChartToSpecBase_isProper`.
     (Suggested label scheme in `task_results/MR2223407ConstructionHilbertQuot/Basic.lean.md`.)
   - **Functors.lean (8)** under the existing "GlueData implementation helpers" §:
     `grassInclusion_self_isIso`, `grassMinorMatrixLoc_self`, `grassTransMatrix_self`,
     `grassTransAux_self`, `grassTrans_self`, `grassTransMorphism_self`, `grassTransAux_minor`,
     `grassTransAux_minor_isUnit_of`. (Label/`\uses` table in `task_results/Functors.md`.)

## P2 — Finish `grassmannianScheme := D.glued` (closest to completion, low risk)
All GlueData fields now in hand or scouted: `f`/`f_open`/`f_id`(=`grassInclusion_self_isIso`)/
`t`/`t_id`(=`grassTransMorphism_self`); `f_hasPullback`/`f_mono` automatic. Remaining = `t'` DATA +
`t_fac` + `cocycle`. Exact API path (from `task_results/Functors.md`):
- Identify `pullback (f I J) (f I K)` with `Spec (TensorProduct ℤ[X^I] ℤ[X^I,1/P^I_J] ℤ[X^I,1/P^I_K])`
  via `AlgebraicGeometry.pullbackSpecIso`; the tensor is `Away (P^I_J·P^I_K)` by
  `IsLocalization.Away.tensor`/`.tensorRight`/`.mul'`.
- `t'` := lift `grassTransAux I J` twice with `Localization.awayLift`, gate discharged by
  **`grassTransAux_minor_isUnit_of`** (proven this iter — the `hK` hyp is automatic since `P^I_K` is
  inverted in the target).
- `t_fac`/`cocycle` reduce via `pullbackSpecIso_hom_fst/_snd` + `IsLocalization.ringHom_ext` to the
  **already-proven `grassmannian_cocycle`**. No new math.
- **Dead-ends to avoid** (prover-verified): (a) do NOT `rw [grassInclusion, isIso_SpecMap_iff]`
  directly — `unfold grassInclusion grassOverlap grassChart grassChartRing` first; (b) do NOT use
  `IsOpenImmersion.lift` with a `Set.range ⊆ Set.range` / `PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen` argument — strictly
  harder than `pullbackSpecIso`; (c) do NOT introduce a bespoke `grassDoubleRing` — reuse the tensor
  product `pullbackSpecIso` hands you.

## P3 — Continue relativeProj keystone (chart model DONE)
Single-chart model + base-retargeted separated/proper morphism are built axiom-clean. Next:
- Frame-change transition iso: from invertible `g : Matrix (Fin (n+1)) (Fin (n+1)) A`, build the
  degree-preserving change of variables as `GradedRingHom (homogeneousSubmodule …) (homogeneousSubmodule …)`
  (via `MvPolynomial.aeval`), then `AlgebraicGeometry.Proj.map` (confirmed present,
  `ProjectiveSpectrum/Functor.lean`); iso-ness + cocycle from the `grassmannian_cocycle` matrix pattern.
- The genuinely-absent piece is the **trivialising affine cover of `S`** for a locally-free `V`
  (cross-`S` GlueData cover machinery). Design the GlueData as a unit (mirror the Grassmannian
  GlueData) rather than building isolated pieces — prover flagged misalignment risk.
- Then `relativeProj S V := D.glued` (replacing the stub) + glued structure morphism from
  `projChartToSpecBase`. Only after the stub is replaced does `quot_properness` (2) become reachable.

## Blocked — do NOT re-assign as tactic targets
- **`relativeProj`, `relativeProj.structureMorphism`, `coherent_higher_direct_image`,
  `serre_vanishing`, `cohomology_and_base_change`, `faithfullyFlatDescent`** (Basic.lean stubs):
  Mathlib-gap-blocked (relative Proj of a sheaf, Serre vanishing, coherent cohomology, full
  fppf-descent). Discharge only via the foundational BUILDs. Never `axiom`. (`relativeProj` is the
  active BUILD via the chart model above — but its `sorry` body is not closed by tactics.)
- **`quot_properness` (2nd conjunct)**: gap-blocked on `IsSeparated (relativeProj.structureMorphism)`
  — UNPROVABLE while `relativeProj` is a `sorryAx` stub (opaque morphism has no provable properties).
  Falls out once the glued relativeProj replaces the stub (P3). Do NOT re-assign now.
- **`flatness_local_criterion` (2)**: gap-blocked on openness of the flat locus (EGA IV 11.1.1).

## Reusable proof patterns discovered this iter (also in PROJECT_STATUS Knowledge Base)
- **Finite-type over the grade-zero part**: Mathlib gives `FiniteType` only over the *base*; build
  `IsScalarTower A (𝒜0) A[t•]` (`IsScalarTower.of_algebraMap_eq` + `SetLike.GradeZero.*`) then
  `Algebra.FiniteType.of_restrictScalars_finiteType A _ _`. Unlocks the `Proj` `IsProper` instance.
- **Scheme iso from a `RingEquiv`**: `asIso (Spec.map e.toCommRingCatIso.hom)`. Do NOT use
  `Scheme.Spec.mapIso (… .asIso.op)` — `CommRingCat.Hom.asIso` does not exist.
- **`isIso_SpecMap_iff` needs syntactic `Spec`**: `unfold` any wrapping chart defs first.
- **`A[t•]₀ = A`**: `MvPolynomial.homogeneousSubmodule_zero` (`𝒜0 = 1`) + `Submodule.one_eq_range`
  (surj) + `MvPolynomial.C_injective` (inj) ⟹ `algebraMap` bijective ⟹ `RingEquiv.ofBijective`.
- **Transition-on-minor value**: a ring hom commutes with `det`/`submatrix`; combined with
  `Matrix.det_mul` gives `θ_{I,J}(P^J_K) = det((X^I_J)⁻¹)·P^I_K`. `rw [grassMinor]` fails (plain def) —
  use `change` to the explicit submatrix-det goal.
